title: Bouncer Frontmatter Schema
description: JSON Schema for YAML frontmatter in Bouncer guardrail files (.bouncer.md). Shared schema standard with skill files for authoring consistency.

name.description: Human-readable identifier for this Bouncer policy. MUST be present.

description.description: Clear description of the policy intent. MUST be present.

version.description: Semantic version string (e.g. 0.1.0). SHOULD follow semver.

author.description: Author or organization responsible for this policy.

tags.description: Categorization tags for discovery and filtering (e.g. security, prompt-injection, finserv).

applies_to.description: Agent names, pipeline names, or scope identifiers this policy applies to.

severity.description: Risk severity level of the controls defined in this file.

priority.description: Enforcement priority. 'immutable' MUST NOT be overridden at any scope. 'strict' applies with high precedence. 'flexible' may be relaxed by higher-trust contexts.

license.description: SPDX license identifier or license name (e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0).

examples.name: Prompt Injection Defense
examples.description: Prevents instruction override and malicious prompt injection attempts.
examples.author: bouncer-md

examples.name: Financial Services Compliance
examples.description: Guardrails for finserv agents covering data handling, disclosure, and regulatory boundaries.
examples.author: bouncer-md
